# `!unpack`

**Category:** files

Extract an archive (tar.gz/tgz/tar.bz2/tar.xz/tar/zip, or single-file gz/bz2/xz) on the target into a destination directory. Source archive must exist on the target.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `src` | path | yes | Remote path to the archive (format inferred from extension). |
| `dest` | path | yes | Remote destination directory (created if missing). |
| `mode` | string | no | Octal permission string applied recursively via chmod -R after extraction. |
| `owner` | string | no | Owner applied recursively via chown -R after extraction. |
| `group` | string | no | Group applied recursively via chown -R after extraction. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !unpack
  src: /opt/app/app.tar.gz
  dest: /opt/app
  owner: app
  group: app
```
